name: @lesto/example-mcp-auth-openauth
description: The agent-native wedge with a REAL self-hosted issuer: an OpenAuth Authorization Server (its own Hono app/Worker) mints JWTs, and a Lesto MCP Resource Server validates them purely via the issuer's JWKS — the @lesto/mcp createBearerAuthenticator/createMcpHttpHandlers governance unchanged, the external issuer a config swap (ADR 0039 interim real issuer).
